name: Flip Wreck
description: Flip Wreck is a small blue dolphin-like creature, with a small blowhole on his forehead, yellow eyes, a small dorsal fin on his back, a short rounded beak and small pointed triangular teeth in his mouth. He wears a blue belt, with a small silver seashell as the buckle, blue shoulder pads, blue boots on his feet, and silver armour, containing the water logo, on his forehead. He also carries two weapons, a large navigator wheel from a boat, and a wooden sword with shark's teeth tied around the edges.
biography: Most of the dolphins of Bottlenose Bay spent their days playing in the waves. However, Flip Wreck was different. Always the adventurous one, he took it upon himself to be a self-appointed protector of his undersea world. One day, while exploring an underwater graveyard of shipwrecks, he came across a massive Ice Viking ship that was still intact. Suddenly, a huge crew of Ice Vikings burst out from inside and began leading an attack on the unarmed dolphin residents. Flip Wreck took off at once and quickly fastened together armor, shield, and sword using pieces from the nearby wrecks. He then single-handedly defeated the Ice Vikings, who retreated never to be seen again. For his heroic actions, Flip Wreck was made a Skylander and now turns the tide against evil in Skylands!
personality: Flip Wreck might be the fearless protector of Bottlenose Bay and a hero to his dolphin friends but, don't worry, he doesn't let it go to his head.

story.content: Flip Wreck is a small blue dolphin-like creature, with a small blowhole on his forehead, yellow eyes, a small dorsal fin on his back, a short rounded beak and small pointed triangular teeth in his mouth. He wears a blue belt, with a small silver seashell as the buckle, blue shoulder pads, blue boots on his feet, and silver armour, containing the water logo, on his forehead. He also carries two weapons, a large navigator wheel from a boat, and a wooden sword with shark's teeth tied around the edges.
Flip Wreck might be the fearless protector of Bottlenose Bay and a hero to his dolphin friends but, don't worry, he doesn't let it go to his head.

Most of the dolphins of Bottlenose Bay spent their days playing in the waves. However, Flip Wreck was different. Always the adventurous one, he took it upon himself to be a self-appointed protector of his undersea world. One day, while exploring an underwater graveyard of shipwrecks, he came across a massive Ice Viking ship that was still intact. Suddenly, a huge crew of Ice Vikings burst out from inside and began leading an attack on the unarmed dolphin residents. Flip Wreck took off at once and quickly fastened together armor, shield, and sword using pieces from the nearby wrecks. He then single-handedly defeated the Ice Vikings, who retreated never to be seen again. For his heroic actions, Flip Wreck was made a Skylander and now turns the tide against evil in Skylands!

content: The mabu saw me spinning on my wheel and thought it would be fun to try. Silena is going to help us build a giant one for the mabu.
Woah! Masked Mabu slow down before you- *CRASH* ... Crash.

trivia: Flip Wreck, and Thumpback are currently the only Skylanders based on cetaceans. Also being kinds of whales, they share similarities.
They both share the ability to shoot water out of their blowholes as a method of attack.
They both wear shoulder pads and belts around their waists.
They both have pointed teeth in their mouths.
Flip Wreck is voiced by Jess Harnell, who also voices Blast Zone, Gusto, and Crash Bandicoot.
He is the only one of the Frito Lay Skylanders whose original name wasn't revealed.
His files in Trap Team show his placeholder name as Sea Saw.
Flip Wreck is one of the several Skylanders who use a shield (the others being Ignitor, Chop Chop, Chill, Doom Stone, Wildfire and High Volt).
Flip Wreck's weapon is based off of a Hawaiian shark toothed sword.
His name is a play on 'Shipwreck'.

trailers.name: Skylanders Trap Team - Flip Wreck's Soul Gem Preview (Making Waves)

gameplay: Flip Wreck utilizes a combination of sword techniques and defensive shield maneuvers. He can ride his wheel shield to damage enemies in his path, bash them directly, or enter a defensive Shield Mode. His blowhole allows for water-based splash damage, and he can be upgraded to release homing fish projectiles and execute powerful sword combos like the Whirlpool and Undersea Ambush.

basic.name: Sea Saw
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to swing the saw sword.

basic.name: Wheeling and Dealing
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to hop on the wheel shield, damaging anything in your path.

basic_upgrades.name: Wheel Shield Bash
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to bash enemies with the wheel shield.

basic_upgrades.name: Splash Damage
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 1 to blast enemies with your blowhole.

basic_upgrades.name: Shield Mode
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 3 to enter Shield Mode, invulnerable to enemy attacks.

soulgems.name: Sea Slammer
soulgems.content: While riding the wheel shield, press Attack 1, Attack 1, Attack 1 to slam down on the ground.

abilities.name: Fish?!?
abilities.content: Press Attack 3 to release fish projectiles while riding the Wheel Shield.

abilities.name: Homing Fish
abilities.content: Press Attack 3 to release a fish projectile that hops towards enemies.

abilities.name: Endless Fish
abilities.content: While riding the wheel shield, hold Attack 3 to shoot unlimited fish projectiles.

abilities.name: Sword Swells
abilities.content: Press Attack 1, Attack 1, Attack 1 to gush forward a damaging water swell.

abilities.name: Sea Saw Combos
abilities.content: Press Attack 1, Attack 1, Hold Attack 2 for Whirlpool combo. Press Attack 1, Attack 1, HOLD attack 3 for Undersea Ambush combo.

abilities.name: Blowhole Blaster
abilities.content: Splash Damage attack has more range and does increased damage.
